overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a Quadra vehicle navigating rain-soaked neon-lit city highways and streets at night. The player accelerates from a slow start to high speeds, overtaking vehicles and navigating through urban infrastructure with heavy rain and atmospheric haze.

events.description: overtakes slower vehicle on the left side
rapid acceleration from 36 km/h to 76 km/h

agents.ego_description: accelerating from 29 km/h and overtaking a slower vehicle on the left, building speed to 76 km/h while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: slower vehicle being overtaken by ego on the left

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with QUADRA branding and pink neon HUD elements
heavy rain droplets covering the windshield with wiper marks
rain-soaked multi-lane highway reflecting neon lights
tall concrete and metal safety barrier along the right side of the highway
metal fencing along the left side of the highway
tall vertical neon sign with illuminated text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a Quadra vehicle on a rain-soaked highway at night. The driver overtakes a slower vehicle and accelerates rapidly from 29 to 76 km/h. The windshield is covered in rain droplets, and neon signs illuminate the wet asphalt ahead. Concrete barriers line both sides of the multi-lane road.

events.description: maintains steady high speed cruising between 85-89 km/h
passes large digital billboard featuring anime-style character on right

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed on straight highway section, steering smoothly through light rain

entered.detail: exit ramp branching off to the right side of the highway
large illuminated billboard displaying animated character advertisement

segments.scene_description: The vehicle maintains high speed between 76-89 km/h on a straight elevated highway section. Large digital billboards with anime-style characters line the right side, while street lights and distant skyscrapers are visible through the rain. The concrete barrier moves closer to the vehicle as the road narrows slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: begins significant deceleration from 58 km/h to navigate upcoming turns
approaches intersection with red traffic light, preparing to stop

agents.ego_description: decelerating from 58 km/h down to 36 km/h, navigating turns and entering the urban street grid with commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: cross traffic vehicle visible at intersection waiting at light

entered.detail: multi-story commercial and residential buildings lining the street
illuminated traffic signal showing red light
road signs and traffic control devices
painted road markings indicating crosswalk and stop lines

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows significantly from highway speeds to navigate urban streets, passing commercial buildings and approaching intersections. Traffic lights and cross traffic become visible as the environment transitions from open highway to city streets. The rain continues to obscure visibility through the windshield.

events.description: enters covered underpass with reduced lighting and concrete overhead structure
navigates sharp turn under highway overpass, speed fluctuates between 36-76 km/h

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets with stops at traffic lights, accelerating through intersections and turning under overpasses

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead at traffic light moving through intersection

entered.detail: concrete tunnel entrance with overhead cover
covered roadway with concrete ceiling and walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass with artificial lighting, transitioning from open rain to a sheltered concrete structure. Digital billboards line the left side while the vehicle navigates sharp turns under highway overpasses. Speed fluctuates as the driver accelerates and brakes for the curved roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial with palm trees and billboards

events.description: rapid acceleration from 48 km/h to 84 km/h on straight section
hard braking from 84 km/h down to 24 km/h approaching final intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speed then performing hard braking maneuver, navigating final curves and approaching intersection

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics
tropical palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features rapid acceleration to 84 km/h followed by hard braking to 24 km/h. The vehicle passes palm trees and large digital billboards while navigating wet city streets. The concrete barrier moves further away as the road widens, and the vehicle approaches a final intersection with traffic lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked open highway into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a futuristic city. It begins with a rapid acceleration past slower traffic on a multi-lane road, where rain droplets streak across the windshield and neon signs reflect off the wet asphalt. As the vehicle maintains high speed along an elevated section, the environment shifts toward a skyline of skyscrapers and towering anime-style digital billboards. The scene then transitions from the open highway to narrower urban streets, slowing down to navigate commercial buildings and traffic lights before entering a sheltered concrete underpass with artificial lighting. Finally, the vehicle weaves through sharp turns and past palm trees, fluctuating in speed as it approaches a wide city intersection under the glow of massive digital displays.
